Info.FallbackMode: MiniQoL: fallback mode (no flags yet). Click Roll Damage to initialize.
Info.SacrificialArmorBroken: {item} loses coverage on {location} and is now Broken.
Info.SacrificialShieldBroken: {item} is sacrificed and is now Broken.
Info.SacrificialWeaponBroken: {item} is sacrificed and is now Broken.

Button.BreakGuardHint: Spend 2 Momentum to apply Guard Broken to this target

BonusDamage.Title: Bonus Damage
BonusDamage.Detail: Add +1 damage per Momentum spent to the current successful attack.

BreakGuard.Title: Break Guard
BreakGuard.Detail: On an attack or Defend Reaction, the target loses Guard.

CalledShot.Title: Called Shot
CalledShot.Detail: Choose the hit location of a physical attack.

Confidence.Title: Confidence
Confidence.Detail: Gain 1§ Morale Soak per Momentum spent until the start of the next turn.

Disarm.Title: Disarm
Disarm.Detail: Knock one weapon from the target. Cost is 2 for one-handed, 3 for braced or two-handed weapons.

Penetration.Title: Penetration
Penetration.Detail: Ignore 2 Soak per Momentum spent for the current attack.

ReRollDamage.Title: Re-roll Damage
ReRollDamage.Detail: Re-roll any number of damage dice from the current attack.

SecondWind.Title: Second Wind
SecondWind.Detail: Immediately recover 1 point per Momentum spent in the chosen capability.

SecondaryTarget.Title: Secondary Target
SecondaryTarget.Detail: A second target within Reach of the primary target is also affected and suffers half damage.

Subdue.Title: Subdue
Subdue.Detail: The attack gains the Nonlethal Quality.

SwiftAction.Title: Swift Action
SwiftAction.Detail: Gain an additional Standard Action. Any required skill test increases by one Difficulty step.

Withdraw.Title: Withdraw
Withdraw.Detail: Leave an enemy's Reach without triggering Retaliate.

Warn.DamageSpecMissing: Damage data not found on this item yet (v0.1).
Warn.DefenseSkillUnavailable: MiniQoL cannot determine the correct native defense skill for this actor yet.
Warn.DoomTrackerUnavailable: MiniQoL could not find the system Doom tracker in the DOM.
Warn.NoTargetsCaptured: No targets are synced to this attack. Select or clear targets on the canvas, then click the target button.
Warn.NoSacrificialCandidates: No equipped, unbroken armor/shield/weapon found to sacrifice.

Err.StressPathMissing: Cannot find the Stress field on this actor (check debug logs).

Protect.ResolvedFailed: Protect failed: original target is hit

Defend.Title: Defend
Defend.Content: {defender} may Defend against this {attackType} attack. This reaction currently costs {cost} Doom. Open the native defense roll?

Protect.Title: Protect
Protect.Content: {protector} may Protect {target} against this {attackType} attack. This reaction currently costs {cost} Doom and resolves at D2. Open the native defense roll?

Retaliate.Title: Retaliate
Retaliate.Content: {retaliator} may Retaliate against {target} using {weapon}. This reaction currently costs {cost} Doom. Open the native melee attack?

Sacrificial.Title: Sacrificial Armor
Sacrificial.Content: Use Sacrificial Armor to ignore 1 Wound (once per scene)?

BreakGuard.Title: Break Guard
BreakGuard.Content: Spend 2 Momentum to Break Guard on {name}? (Target loses Guard)

Reach.NoteNoTarget: Reach: select a target to preview reach adjustments.
Reach.NoteMultiTarget: Reach: multiple targets selected; no automatic difficulty adjustment.
Reach.NoteNoGuard: Reach: target has Guard Broken; no penalty (attacker Reach {attackerReach}, defender Reach {defenderReach}).
Reach.NoteNoChange: Reach: no adjustment (attacker Reach {attackerReach}, defender Reach {defenderReach}).
Reach.NotePreview: Reach: would increase Difficulty by +{delta} (attacker Reach {attackerReach}, defender Reach {defenderReach}). Current D{base} → D{next}.
Reach.NoteApplied: Reach: applied +{delta} Difficulty (attacker Reach {attackerReach}, defender Reach {defenderReach}). D{base} → D{next}.

AutoRollDamage.Name: Auto-roll damage
AutoRollDamage.Hint: Automatically roll damage when an attack chat message is created.

AutoApplyDamage.Name: Auto-apply damage (single target)
AutoApplyDamage.Hint: Automatically apply damage if exactly one target was selected.

AutoReachDifficulty.Name: Auto-adjust Difficulty for Reach
AutoReachDifficulty.Hint: When using a Reach-based attack (melee), increase Difficulty by the reach difference vs the selected target (RAW Reach/Guard).

HitLocationEnabled.Name: Use Hit Location
HitLocationEnabled.Hint: Roll and store hit location per target (used for soak in later versions).

SacrificialArmorEnabled.Name: Enable Sacrificial Armor
SacrificialArmorEnabled.Hint: Offer a prompt to ignore 1 Wound once per scene (v0.1 simplified).

AutoProtectReaction.Name: Automatic Protect reaction
AutoProtectReaction.Hint: If enabled, MiniQoL will automatically prompt Protect after a failed or declined Defend. If disabled, Protect is handled manually.

AllowPlayersRequestApply.Name: Allow players to request Apply/Undo
AllowPlayersRequestApply.Hint: Players can click Apply/Undo; execution is GM-first via socket.

ShowApplyAll.Name: Show Apply All
ShowApplyAll.Hint: Show an Apply All button when multiple targets exist.

Debug.Name: Debug logging
Debug.Hint: Log extra info to the browser console to help refine actor/item paths.

PromptBreakGuard.Name: Show Break Guard helper (2 Momentum)
PromptBreakGuard.Hint: After a successful hit that generated 2+ Momentum, show an inline Break Guard helper on the attack card instead of a popup.

SacrificialWeapons.Name: Allow Sacrificial Weapons (homebrew)
SacrificialWeapons.Hint: If enabled, Sacrificial Armor can also break an equipped weapon when no armor/shield is available.
